payload.description: entrypoint.py probes 300+ RPC nodes and downloads a fresh 107GB snapshot on every pod restart, even when the validator was only down briefly and existing bank state is fresh. A snapshot leapfrog design with two thresholds (SNAPSHOT_MAX_AGE_SLOTS=20000 for full, SNAPSHOT_INCREMENTAL_AGE_SLOTS=5000 for incremental-only) was implemented in biscayne-agave-runbook commit 3bf87a2 but never deployed — the container image was never rebuilt with the updated entrypoint.py and snapshot_download.py.
payload.title: entrypoint.py downloads full snapshot on every restart
